meta.source: OSS data/big-data tools as square AWS-style tiles (brand colour + white glyph). Glyphs from simple-icons (MIT); tools without a simple-icons glyph fall back to a coloured text tile. Rebuild: python3 scripts/build_pack.py bigdata
